name: router-capability-columns
outcome_goal: Migrate task_type_router scoring from string capability_tags to the typed boolean cap_* columns on provider_model_candidates. Migration 094 already added and populated 10 columns on all 321 active models: cap_language_high, cap_language_low, cap_build_high/med/low, cap_analysis_architecture_research, cap_research_fan, cap_review, cap_tool_use, cap_image. Extend `_load_active_catalog_candidates` in `Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/task_type_router.py` to select these columns and rework the scorer to consult the typed booleans per task_type (e.g. code_generation -> cap_build_high, research -> cap_research_fan, code_review -> cap_review). Keep capability_tags as fallback for any candidate where all cap_* are NULL. Add a unit test proving the typed path is preferred when columns are set.
